hero.title: Administrative & Operations Specialist | IT Enthusiast
hero.description: Informatics Engineering student with experience in administration, data processing, document verification, and event operations. Skilled in web development and data management.
about.bio_1: An Informatics Engineering student at Bina Sarana Informatika University with hands-on experience in administration, data processing, document verification, and operational activities.
about.bio_2: Experienced in supporting corporate administration, data management, event operational coordination, and developing web-based systems using Python, Laravel, and Flutter.
about.bio_3: Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills. Able to adapt and work effectively both individually and in teams. Passionate about bridging administrative expertise with technology.
